providers.description: Providers contains per-provider transport and API options.

wrappers.description: Wrappers contains pipeline wrapper options applied around provider.

Config.description: Config is a full transitext configuration document.

microsoft.description: Microsoft configures unofficial Microsoft Edge backend.

google.description: Google configures official Google Translate API backend.

yandex.description: Yandex configures official Yandex Cloud Translate backend.

azure.description: Azure configures official Azure Translator backend.

deepl.description: DeepL configures official DeepL API backend.

bingfree.description: BingFree configures unofficial Bing web backend.

yandexfree.description: YandexFree configures unofficial Yandex web backend.

deeplfree.description: DeepLFree configures unofficial DeepL web backend.

googlefree.description: GoogleFree configures unofficial Google web backend.

openai.description: OpenAI configures OpenAI-compatible chat translation backend.

Providers.description: Providers groups built-in provider option blocks.

context.description: Context configures context marker injection mode.

retry.description: Retry configures automatic retries for retryable errors.

partial.description: Partial configures per-item fallback behavior on batch failures.

long_text.description: LongText configures auto-splitting for oversized text items.

rate_limit.description: RateLimit configures minimum interval between outbound requests.

Wrappers.description: Wrappers groups wrapper options used by transitext.Wrap(...).

base_url.description: BaseURL overrides Azure translate endpoint URL.

key.description: Key is Azure Translator subscription key.

region.description: Region is Azure Translator resource region.

timeout.description: Timeout is request timeout when HTTPClient is not provided.

batch_max_items.description: BatchMaxItems limits request batch size by item count.

batch_max_chars.description: BatchMaxChars limits request batch size by total chars.

request.description: Request controls low-level HTTP header/cookie/user-agent shaping.

user_agent.description: UserAgent overrides default request user agent.

timeout.description: Timeout is request timeout when HTTPClient is not provided.

max_items.description: MaxItems limits items per one transitext batch.

max_chars.description: MaxChars limits total chars per one transitext batch.

max_text_chars.description: MaxTextChars limits one input text length.

source_lang.description: SourceLang sets default source language when request.SourceLang is empty.

formality.description: Formality controls formality mode where supported.

split_sentences.description: SplitSentences controls DeepL sentence splitting behavior.

batch_max_items.description: BatchMaxItems limits request batch size by item count.

batch_max_chars.description: BatchMaxChars limits request batch size by total chars.

timeout.description: Timeout is request timeout when HTTPClient is not provided.

use_free_api.description: UseFreeAPI selects free endpoint when URL is empty.

preserve_formatting.description: PreserveFormatting preserves source formatting when true.

url.description: URL overrides DeepL web endpoint URL.

user_agent.description: UserAgent overrides default request user agent.

request.description: Request controls low-level HTTP header/cookie/user-agent shaping.

dl_session.description: DLSession optionally sends dl_session cookie for authenticated web mode.

split_mode.description: SplitMode controls DeepL splitting mode (for example "newlines").

request_alternatives.description: RequestAlternatives sets requestAlternatives for each text.

max_items.description: MaxItems limits items per one transitext batch.

max_chars.description: MaxChars limits total chars per one transitext batch.

max_text_chars.description: MaxTextChars limits one input text length.

timeout.description: Timeout is request timeout when HTTPClient is not provided.

base_url.description: BaseURL overrides official Google endpoint URL.

key.description: API key for Google Translate API.

format.description: Format controls source text format: "text" or "html".

model.description: Model selects Google translation model when supported.

timeout.description: Timeout is request timeout when HTTPClient is not provided.

batch_max_items.description: BatchMaxItems limits request batch size by item count.

batch_max_chars.description: BatchMaxChars limits request batch size by total chars.

request.description: Request controls low-level HTTP header/cookie/user-agent shaping.

user_agent.description: UserAgent overrides default request user agent.

timeout.description: Timeout is request timeout when HTTPClient is not provided.

max_items.description: MaxItems limits items per one transitext batch.

max_chars.description: MaxChars limits total chars per one transitext batch.

max_text_chars.description: MaxTextChars limits one input text length.

concurrency.description: Concurrency limits parallel per-item HTTP calls.

api_key.description: API key for LibreTranslate instance (optional for some deployments).

format.description: Format controls source text format: "text" or "html".

batch_max_items.description: BatchMaxItems limits request batch size by item count.

batch_max_chars.description: BatchMaxChars limits request batch size by total chars.

timeout.description: Timeout is request timeout when HTTPClient is not provided.

request.description: Request controls low-level HTTP header/cookie/user-agent shaping.

authentication_headers.description: AuthenticationHeaders are applied directly in custom_headers mode.

translate_options.description: TranslateOptions adds optional query params to translate endpoint.

user_agent.description: UserAgent overrides default request user agent.

timeout.description: Timeout is request timeout when HTTPClient is not provided.

max_items.description: MaxItems limits items per one provider HTTP request.

max_chars.description: MaxChars limits total chars per one provider HTTP request.

base_url.description: BaseURL is OpenAI-compatible API base URL.

auth_token.description: AuthToken is bearer token for API authentication.

instruction_prefix.description: InstructionPrefix is prepended to request instructions.

instruction_suffix.description: InstructionSuffix is appended to request instructions.

max_tokens.description: MaxTokens sets response token cap when supported.

strict_json_array.description: StrictJSONArray requires strict JSON array response parsing.

batch_max_items.description: BatchMaxItems limits request batch size by items.

batch_max_chars.description: BatchMaxChars limits request batch size by chars.

timeout.description: Timeout is HTTP timeout when HTTPClient is not provided.

include_hints.description:
IncludeHints adds `hints` fields into cache key.
Enable this when hints can change translation output.

include_metadata.description:
IncludeMetadata adds request metadata into cache key.
Enable this only if metadata affects provider output.

context.description: Context is default translation context injected for each item.

context_by_id.description: ContextByID overrides context for specific item IDs.

context_token.description: ContextToken is marker inserted before context payload.

text_token.description: TextToken is marker inserted before source text payload.

end_token.description: EndToken is marker appended after source text payload.

transitext_ContextOptions.description: ContextOptions controls experimental context-injection wrapper behavior.

headers.description: Headers sets default headers applied when missing in request.

cookies.description: Cookies sets default cookies applied when request cookie header is empty.

user_agent.description: UserAgent sets default User-Agent when request does not set it explicitly.

transitext_HTTPRequestOptions.description: HTTPRequestOptions controls generic outbound request shaping for providers.

error_on_overflow.description:
ErrorOnOverflow fails when item exceeds MaxTextChars.
By default long items are split and merged automatically.

item_retries.description: ItemRetries is extra retry count for one failed item.

continue_on_temporary.description: ContinueOnTemporary keeps processing after temporary provider errors.

continue_on_context.description: ContinueOnContext keeps processing after context cancellation/deadline.

min_interval.description:
MinInterval is minimal delay between outbound requests.
Set `0` to disable throttling.

transitext_RateLimitOptions.description: RateLimitOptions controls rate limit wrapper behavior.

attempts.description: Attempts is total number of attempts for one request, including first try.

delay.description: Delay defines delay before first retry.

max_delay.description: MaxDelay defines maximum delay cap between retries.

backoff.description: Backoff multiplies delay after each failed attempt.

retry_permanent.description: RetryPermanent allows retry for permanent provider errors.

base_url.description: BaseURL overrides Yandex translate endpoint URL.

api_key.description: API key for Yandex Cloud Translate.

iam_token.description: IAMToken can be used instead of APIKey.

folder_id.description: FolderID is Yandex Cloud folder id for API key auth mode.

timeout.description: Timeout is request timeout when HTTPClient is not provided.

batch_max_items.description: BatchMaxItems limits request batch size by item count.

batch_max_chars.description: BatchMaxChars limits request batch size by total chars.

request.description: Request controls low-level HTTP header/cookie/user-agent shaping.

base_url.description: BaseURL overrides Yandex free API base URL.

timeout.description: Timeout is request timeout when HTTPClient is not provided.

max_items.description: MaxItems limits items per one transitext batch.

max_chars.description: MaxChars limits total chars per one transitext batch.

max_text_chars.description: MaxTextChars limits one input text length.
